title: Cosmetic Armor Head Items
description: An addon to Cosmetic Armor that allows using any item as a cosmetic helmet.
body: An addon to [Cosmetic Armor Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor-updated/version/1.8.0) that allows using any item as a cosmetic helmet. It still respects the blacklist that can be set through the original mod though.
